quadlet.description: Track Quadlet .container images at both the rootful path and the rootless users/<uid>/ path.

packageRules.description: Group ALL container image and Actions updates into one PR. Headscale excluded — it gets its own PR due to pre-1.0 breaking-change risk.
Headscale: always its own separate PR — pre-1.0, any minor (0.x) bump can carry breaking DB/config changes.
Postgres: block major version bumps. A major upgrade changes the on-disk data directory format and requires a manual pg_dump/pg_restore migration. Update allowedVersions deliberately when ready.
